tools.name: top_stories
tools.description: Return the current Hacker News front-page stories.

n.description: How many stories to return (from the top).

steps.expr: (args) => Array.from(document.querySelectorAll('tr.athing')).slice(0, args.n ?? 10).map((row) => { const a = row.querySelector('.titleline a'); const sub = row.nextElementSibling; const score = sub && sub.querySelector('.score'); return { title: a ? a.textContent.trim() : '', url: a ? a.href : '', points: score ? score.textContent.trim() : '' }; })
